title: Amalgamation and Demerger of Wim Plast Ltd (526586) into Cello World Limited
---

## Summary

BSE has notified trading members that pursuant to a Composite Scheme of Arrangement (Demerger/Amalgamation) approved by the Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Ahmedabad Bench, Wim Plast Limited (WPL, Scrip Code: 526586) has fixed 09 June 2026 as the record date. Trading in WPL shares will be suspended from 09/06/2026 (Settlement No. DR-647/2026-2027). The scheme involves two components: a demerger of WPL's manufacturing business into Cello Consumer Products Private Limited (CCPPL), and amalgamation of WPL's remaining business into Cello World Limited (CWL).

## Key Points

- Record date fixed: **09 June 2026** for both demerger and amalgamation
- No dealings / trading suspension effective: **09/06/2026** (Settlement No. DR-647/2026-2027)
- Three entities involved: Wim Plast Limited (WPL), Cello Consumer Products Private Limited (CCPPL), and Cello World Limited (CWL)
- Scheme approved by NCLT, Ahmedabad Bench under Sections 230–232 of the Companies Act, 2013
- Demerger swap ratio: **55 CWL equity shares (Rs.5 each)** for every **100 WPL shares (Rs.10 each)**
- Amalgamation swap ratio: **31 CWL equity shares (Rs.5 each)** for every **100 WPL shares (Rs.10 each)**

## Regulatory Changes

The composite scheme has been sanctioned by NCLT, Ahmedabad Bench under Sections 230 to 232 and other applicable provisions of the Companies Act, 2013. The scheme restructures WPL into two parts: the manufacturing undertaking is demerged into CCPPL, while the residual business is amalgamated into CWL.

## Compliance Requirements

- Trading members must note the suspension of trading in Wim Plast Ltd (526586) effective 09/06/2026
- Members must update client holdings and settlement systems to reflect the record date and upcoming share entitlements in CWL
- Shareholders of WPL (other than shares held by CWL) are entitled to receive CWL equity shares under both the demerger and amalgamation legs

## Important Dates

| Event | Date |
|---|---|
| Notice Date | 05 June 2026 |
| Record Date (Demerger & Amalgamation) | 09 June 2026 |
| No Dealings / Suspension Effective | 09 June 2026 |
| Settlement Number | DR-647/2026-2027 |

## Impact Assessment

Wim Plast Ltd shareholders will receive CWL equity shares in two tranches — 55 shares per 100 WPL shares for the demerger leg and 31 shares per 100 WPL shares for the amalgamation leg, for a combined entitlement of **86 CWL shares (Rs.5 face value) per 100 WPL shares (Rs.10 face value)**. Trading in WPL will be suspended from the record date. This is a high-impact corporate restructuring event: WPL as a listed entity will effectively cease to trade independently, with its shareholders transitioning to CWL ownership. Market participants holding WPL positions should plan for the suspension and the resulting CWL share allotment.
